{
  ProductSheetBuilderExtensions.g.cs:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

namespace Excelsior;

public static class ProductSheetBuilderExtensions
{
    public static ISheetBuilder<global::Product, TStyle> NameColumn<TStyle>(
        this ISheetBuilder<global::Product, TStyle> builder,
        System.Action<ColumnConfig<TStyle, global::Product, string>> configuration)
        => builder.Column(_ => _.Name, configuration);

    public static void NameHeadingText<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product, TStyle> builder, string value)
        => builder.HeadingText(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameOrder<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product, TStyle> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Order(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameWidth<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product, TStyle> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Width(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameHeadingStyle<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product, TStyle> builder, System.Action<TStyle> value)
        => builder.HeadingStyle(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameCellStyle<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product, TStyle> builder, System.Action<TStyle, global::Product, string> value)
        => builder.CellStyle(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameFormat<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product, TStyle> builder, string value)
        => builder.Format(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameNullDisplay<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product, TStyle> builder, string value)
        => builder.NullDisplay(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameIsHtml<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product, TStyle> builder)
        => builder.IsHtml(_ => _.Name);

    public static void NameRender<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product, TStyle> builder, System.Func<global::Product, string, string?> value)
        => builder.Render(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameFilter<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product, TStyle> builder)
        => builder.Filter(_ => _.Name);

    public static ISheetBuilder<global::Product, TStyle> PriceColumn<TStyle>(
        this ISheetBuilder<global::Product, TStyle> builder,
        System.Action<ColumnConfig<TStyle, global::Product, decimal>> configuration)
        => builder.Column(_ => _.Price, configuration);

    public static void PriceHeadingText<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product, TStyle> builder, string value)
        => builder.HeadingText(_ => _.Price, value);

    public static void PriceOrder<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product, TStyle> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Order(_ => _.Price, value);

    public static void PriceWidth<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product, TStyle> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Width(_ => _.Price, value);

    public static void PriceHeadingStyle<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product, TStyle> builder, System.Action<TStyle> value)
        => builder.HeadingStyle(_ => _.Price, value);

    public static void PriceCellStyle<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product, TStyle> builder, System.Action<TStyle, global::Product, decimal> value)
        => builder.CellStyle(_ => _.Price, value);

    public static void PriceFormat<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product, TStyle> builder, string value)
        => builder.Format(_ => _.Price, value);

    public static void PriceNullDisplay<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product, TStyle> builder, string value)
        => builder.NullDisplay(_ => _.Price, value);

    public static void PriceIsHtml<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product, TStyle> builder)
        => builder.IsHtml(_ => _.Price);

    public static void PriceRender<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product, TStyle> builder, System.Func<global::Product, decimal, string?> value)
        => builder.Render(_ => _.Price, value);

    public static void PriceFilter<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product, TStyle> builder)
        => builder.Filter(_ => _.Price);
}

}
